prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年西南交通大学在上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约9287名→9620名→8940名→13276名→8336名，波动较大。2024年因专业组拆分出现明显后移（13276名），2025年大幅回升至8336名，近两年呈现先降后升的V型走势；2025年基准位次约8336名；该校在上海市综合类招生计划2021年8人、2022年7人、2023年4人、2024年3人、2025年4人，呈逐年缩减趋势；2026年计划招生3人，较2025年减少1人，属小幅缩招，理论上使竞争略有缓和。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西南交通大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名近年稳定在50名左右，2025年第52名、2026年升至第49名，排名稳中有升，体现学校综合实力持续增强；该校近年声誉评价为中性/混合，无明显负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第94位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光度处于中等偏下水平；2023年曾出现投档线异常信号（低关注），但未对整体报考热度造成持续影响；交通运输工程为A+（全国顶尖），土木工程为A，在轨道交通领域具有突出学科优势；2026年在沪招生专业为计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、软件工程）和人工智能，均为当前社会高热推荐专业。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、人工智能为2026年高热推荐专业大类，社会关注度和报考意愿持续走高；上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人（含普通高考），较2025年约49276人增幅约35%，考生规模显著扩大，整体竞争环境明显加剧；西南交通大学位于四川省成都市，属西部高校，在上海市招生规模较小（3–8人），本地考生跨省报考意愿受地域偏好影响有限，但该校在轨道交通领域的行业认可度对相关兴趣考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次8336名、2026年计划缩招（4→3人）使位次理论下移、但上海市考生总数大幅增加（+35%）显著推高竞争烈度、学校排名上升及热门专业招生增强吸引力等多重因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年有所前移（位次数字减小）但幅度有限。预测最低位次约7136名，区间6636–7636名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 西南交通大学2026年在上海市综合类仅招生3人（计算机类2人、人工智能1人），均为当前高热工科专业。预测位次区间6636–7636名，建议位次在此区间内的考生以计算机类为主力报考目标，位次优于区间上限（<6636名）可大胆冲刺；位次接近区间下限（约7600名）可尝试报考但需做好调剂风险准备。由于招生人数极少，报考不确定性较大，建议同时准备同层次保底院校。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Southwest Jiaotong University in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 9287 → 9620 → 8940 → 13276 → 8336, showing significant fluctuations. In 2024, due to the splitting of major groups, there was a notable backward shift (13276), but in 2025 it rebounded sharply to 8336, forming a V-shaped trend of first decline then rise in the past two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 8336. The university's enrollment plan in Shanghai's comprehensive category was 8 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 3 in 2024, and 4 in 2025, showing a gradual reduction trend; the 2026 plan is to enroll 3 students, a decrease of 1 from 2025, which is a slight reduction in enrollment, theoretically easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwest Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking has been stable around 50th in recent years, 52nd in 2025 and rising to 49th in 2026, showing a steady increase in ranking, reflecting the continuous enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength; the university's recent reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion; its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 94th, rated as 'average', with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level; in 2023, there was an abnormal signal in the admission score line (low attention), but it did not have a lasting impact on overall application enthusiasm; Transportation Engineering is A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering is A, with outstanding disciplinary advantages in the field of rail transit; the majors enrolled in Shanghai in 2026 are Computer Class (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering) and Artificial Intelligence, both of which are currently highly recommended popular majors in society.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Class and Artificial Intelligence are highly recommended popular major categories in 2026, with continuously rising social attention and application willingness; the total number of college entrance examination candidates in Shanghai in 2026 is approximately 66,700 (including regular college entrance exams), an increase of about 35% compared to approximately 49,276 in 2025, indicating a significant expansion in the candidate pool and a clear intensification of the overall competitive environment; Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, a western university, with a small enrollment scale in Shanghai (3–8 students), and local candidates' willingness to apply across provinces is limited by regional preferences, but the university's industry recognition in the field of rail transit has strong appeal to students with related interests.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 8336, the 2026 enrollment reduction (4→3) theoretically lowering the ranking, the significant increase in the total number of Shanghai candidates (+35%) substantially raising competition intensity, the university's rising ranking, and the enhanced appeal of popular majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move forward (ranking number decreases) compared to 2025, but to a limited extent. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7136, with a range of 6636–7636.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Class (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
None (the university only offers 2 majors in Shanghai in 2026, both popular directions, with no traditionally low-score majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Southwest Jiaotong University will enroll only 3 students in Shanghai's comprehensive category in 2026 (2 in Computer Class, 1 in Artificial Intelligence), all of which are currently popular engineering majors. The predicted ranking range is 6636–7636. It is recommended that candidates within this range take Computer Class as the primary application target; those with rankings better than the upper limit (<6636) can boldly aim for it; those with rankings near the lower limit (around 7600) can try applying but should be prepared for the risk of adjustment. Due to the extremely small enrollment number, the application uncertainty is high, so it is advisable to also prepare backup schools of the same level.
